title: pelargonium × peramplum
intro: Pelargonium × peramplum, also known as the apple leaf geranium or cape geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant that is native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × peramplum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Pelargonium × peramplum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
